message:
feat: Implement Apple sandbox/Rosetta, Tk detection, pip wheel paths

**_apple_support.zig**:
- isSandboxed: Check APP_SANDBOX_CONTAINER_ID env, HOME path for
  /Library/Containers/, and access to /private/var/folders
- isRosetta: Use sysctl to check proc_translated for Rosetta 2
  translation on x86_64 binaries running on ARM hardware

**idlelib.zig**:
- isAvailable: Check for Tk library in platform-specific paths
  (Tk.framework on macOS, libtk8.6.so on Linux, tk86t.dll on Windows)
- Also check DISPLAY env on Unix (X11 required for Tk GUI)

**ensurepip.zig**:
- get_bundled_pip_path: Search platform-specific wheel directories
  (/usr/share/python-wheels, ensurepip/_bundled, etc.)
- Return full path if wheel found, fallback to wheel name only
